# Lab meeting 2026-03-12

Attendees: me, advisor, two postdocs.

- Advisor pushed back on the single-cell RNA-seq scope creep. Too many
  samples for the current budget.
- Postdoc A suggested we drop the mouse cohort and focus on the human
  organoid line. Cheaper, faster, still publishable.
- Action: write the reduced-scope aim 1 by end of week.
